variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12117 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12117 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12117 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 86.5 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 60.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 51.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 78.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 72.5 mm
